---
title: "Envrionmental Exposure Index"
format: html
---

```{python}
import geopandas as gpd
import os
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import rasterio
from rasterio.warp import calculate_default_transform, reproject, Resampling
from rasterio.mask import mask
import numpy as np
from rasterstats import zonal_stats
```

# Spatial Alignment (CRS + Clipping)
```{python}
DATA_DIR = Path("raw-data")
PROCESSED_DIR = Path("processed-data")
OUT_DIR = PROCESSED_DIR / "aligned"

OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
PROCESSED_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

TARGET_CRS = "EPSG:3435"

TRACTS_PATH  = DATA_DIR / "tl_2022_17_tract.shp"
CHICAGO_PATH = DATA_DIR / "Boundaries_Chicago.geojson"
ROADS_PATH   = DATA_DIR / "tl_2022_17_prisecroads.shp"
TRI_CSV_PATH = DATA_DIR / "EPA_TRI_IL_2022.csv"

RASTERS = {
    "lst_summer": DATA_DIR / "chicago_summer_LST.tif",
    "lst_winter": DATA_DIR / "chicago_winter_LST.tif",
    "ndvi_summer": DATA_DIR / "chicago_summer_NDVI.tif",
    "impervious": DATA_DIR / "chicago_impervious.tif",
}

OUT_DIR = Path("processed-data") / "aligned"
OUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)


def drop_empty(gdf: gpd.GeoDataFrame) -> gpd.GeoDataFrame:
    return gdf[gdf.geometry.notna() & ~gdf.geometry.is_empty].copy()

def fix_geom(gdf: gpd.GeoDataFrame) -> gpd.GeoDataFrame:
    gdf = gdf.copy()
    gdf["geometry"] = gdf.geometry.make_valid()
    return gdf

def dissolve_to_single_polygon(gdf: gpd.GeoDataFrame) -> gpd.GeoDataFrame:
    return gdf.dissolve()

def reproject_and_clip_raster_to_mask(src_path, dst_path, mask_gdf, target_crs=TARGET_CRS):
    """
    Reprojects raster to target CRS, then clips to mask geometry.
    Writes GeoTIFF to dst_path.
    """
    with rasterio.open(src_path) as src:
        src_crs = src.crs
        if src_crs is None:
            raise ValueError(f"Raster has no CRS: {src_path}")

        transform, width, height = calculate_default_transform(
            src_crs, target_crs, src.width, src.height, *src.bounds
        )

        dst_meta = src.meta.copy()
        dst_meta.update({
            "crs": target_crs,
            "transform": transform,
            "width": width,
            "height": height
        })

        tmp_path = OUT_DIR / "__tmp_reproject.tif"
        with rasterio.open(tmp_path, "w", **dst_meta) as dst:
            for i in range(1, src.count + 1):
                reproject(
                    source=rasterio.band(src, i),
                    destination=rasterio.band(dst, i),
                    src_transform=src.transform,
                    src_crs=src_crs,
                    dst_transform=transform,
                    dst_crs=target_crs,
                    resampling=Resampling.bilinear, 
                )

    with rasterio.open(tmp_path) as reproj:
        geoms = [geom for geom in mask_gdf.geometry]
        out_img, out_transform = mask(reproj, geoms, crop=True)
        out_meta = reproj.meta.copy()
        out_meta.update({
            "height": out_img.shape[1],
            "width": out_img.shape[2],
            "transform": out_transform
        })

    with rasterio.open(dst_path, "w", **out_meta) as out:
        out.write(out_img)

    try:
        os.remove(tmp_path)
    except OSError:
        pass

tracts = gpd.read_file(TRACTS_PATH)
tracts = drop_empty(tracts)
tracts = fix_geom(tracts)

chicago = gpd.read_file(CHICAGO_PATH)
chicago = drop_empty(chicago)
chicago = fix_geom(chicago)

tracts = tracts.to_crs(TARGET_CRS)
chicago = chicago.to_crs(TARGET_CRS)

chicago_poly = dissolve_to_single_polygon(chicago)
tracts_chicago = gpd.clip(tracts, chicago_poly)

print("Chicago tracts:", len(tracts_chicago))

roads = gpd.read_file(ROADS_PATH)
roads = drop_empty(roads)
roads = fix_geom(roads)
roads = roads.to_crs(TARGET_CRS)
roads_chicago = gpd.clip(roads, chicago_poly)

print("Road segments (clipped):", len(roads_chicago))

tri = pd.read_csv(TRI_CSV_PATH)

tri = tri.dropna(subset=["12. LATITUDE", "13. LONGITUDE"]).copy()

tri_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    tri,
    geometry=gpd.points_from_xy(tri["13. LONGITUDE"], tri["12. LATITUDE"]),
    crs="EPSG:4326"
).to_crs(TARGET_CRS)

tri_gdf = gpd.clip(tri_gdf, chicago_poly)

print("TRI points (clipped):", len(tri_gdf))

tracts_chicago.to_file(OUT_DIR / "tracts_chicago_2022.gpkg", layer="tracts", driver="GPKG")
roads_chicago.to_file(OUT_DIR / "roads_chicago_2022.gpkg", layer="roads", driver="GPKG")
tri_gdf.to_file(OUT_DIR / "tri_chicago_2022.gpkg", layer="tri", driver="GPKG")

for name, path in RASTERS.items():
    out_path = OUT_DIR / f"{name}_3435_clip.tif"
    reproject_and_clip_raster_to_mask(path, out_path, chicago_poly, target_crs=TARGET_CRS)
    print("Wrote:", out_path)

print("\nDone. Everything is aligned to", TARGET_CRS, "and clipped to Chicago.")
```

# Extracting Metrics from Aligned Data
```{python}
tracts = gpd.read_file(OUT_DIR / "tracts_chicago_2022.gpkg", layer="tracts")
roads  = gpd.read_file(OUT_DIR / "roads_chicago_2022.gpkg", layer="roads")
tri    = gpd.read_file(OUT_DIR / "tri_chicago_2022.gpkg", layer="tri")

def add_zonal_mean(gdf, raster_path, out_col):
    zs = zonal_stats(gdf, raster_path, stats=["mean"], all_touched=False)
    gdf[out_col] = [d["mean"] for d in zs]
    return gdf

tracts = add_zonal_mean(tracts, OUT_DIR / "lst_summer_3435_clip.tif", "lst_summer_mean")

tracts = add_zonal_mean(
    tracts,
    OUT_DIR / "lst_winter_3435_clip.tif",
    "lst_winter_mean"
)

tracts = add_zonal_mean(
    tracts,
    OUT_DIR / "ndvi_summer_3435_clip.tif",
    "ndvi_mean"
)

tracts = add_zonal_mean(
    tracts,
    OUT_DIR / "impervious_3435_clip.tif",
    "impervious_mean"
)

roads_x = gpd.overlay(
    roads[["geometry"]],
    tracts[["GEOID", "geometry"]],
    how="intersection"
)

roads_x["road_len_ft"] = roads_x.geometry.length

road_sum = (
    roads_x.groupby("GEOID")["road_len_ft"]
    .sum()
    .reset_index()
)

tracts["tract_area_ft2"] = tracts.geometry.area

tracts = tracts.merge(road_sum, on="GEOID", how="left")
tracts["road_len_ft"] = tracts["road_len_ft"].fillna(0)

tracts["road_density"] = (
    tracts["road_len_ft"] /
    tracts["tract_area_ft2"]
)

tri = tri.copy()

tri["total_releases"] = pd.to_numeric(
    tri["107. TOTAL RELEASES"],
    errors="coerce"
).fillna(0)

tri_join = gpd.sjoin(
    tri,
    tracts[["GEOID", "geometry"]],
    how="inner",
    predicate="within"
)

tri_summary = (
    tri_join.groupby("GEOID")
    .agg(
        tri_release_total=("total_releases", "sum"),
        tri_facility_count=("2. TRIFD", "nunique")
    )
    .reset_index()
)

tracts = tracts.merge(
    tri_summary,
    on="GEOID",
    how="left"
)

tracts["tri_release_total"] = tracts["tri_release_total"].fillna(0)
tracts["tri_facility_count"] = tracts["tri_facility_count"].fillna(0)

cols = [
    "lst_summer_mean",
    "lst_winter_mean",
    "ndvi_mean",
    "impervious_mean",
    "road_density",
    "tri_release_total",
    "tri_facility_count"
]

print(tracts[cols].isna().sum())
print(tracts[cols].describe())
```

# Data Cleaning -1
```{python}
tracts = tracts.dropna(subset=[
    "lst_summer_mean",
    "lst_winter_mean",
    "ndvi_mean",
    "impervious_mean"
])

tracts["ndvi_bad"] = -tracts["ndvi_mean"]

tracts["tri_release_log"] = np.log1p(
    tracts["tri_release_total"]
)

tracts["cold_bad"] = -tracts["lst_winter_mean"]
```

# Data Cleaning -2
```{python}
print("Rows after dropna:", len(tracts))

qa_cols = [
    "lst_summer_mean",
    "lst_winter_mean",
    "ndvi_mean",
    "ndvi_bad",
    "impervious_mean",
    "road_density",
    "tri_release_total",
    "tri_release_log",
    "tri_facility_count"
]
print("\nMissing values:")
print(tracts[qa_cols].isna().sum())

print("\nInf values:")
print(np.isinf(tracts[qa_cols]).sum())

print("\nNDVI range (should be roughly -1 to 1):",
      tracts["ndvi_mean"].min(), tracts["ndvi_mean"].max())

print("Impervious range (often 0–100 or 0–1 depending on dataset):",
      tracts["impervious_mean"].min(), tracts["impervious_mean"].max())

print("\nTRI raw summary:")
print(tracts["tri_release_total"].describe())

print("\nTRI log summary:")
print(tracts["tri_release_log"].describe())

print("\nInvalid geometries:", (~tracts.is_valid).sum())
print("Empty geometries:", tracts.geometry.is_empty.sum())
```

# Z-Score Standardization
```{python}
vars_for_index = [
    "lst_summer_mean",
    "ndvi_bad",
    "impervious_mean",
    "road_density",
    "tri_release_log"
]

for v in vars_for_index:
    tracts[f"z_{v}"] = (
        tracts[v] - tracts[v].mean()
    ) / tracts[v].std()

weights = {
    "z_lst_summer_mean": 0.25,     
    "z_ndvi_bad": 0.125,           
    "z_impervious_mean": 0.125,    
    "z_road_density": 0.25,        
    "z_tri_release_log": 0.25      
}

tracts["env_exposure_index"] = sum(
    tracts[var] * weight
    for var, weight in weights.items()
)

print(tracts["env_exposure_index"].describe())
```

# Visualize Results
```{python}
tracts["exposure_percentile"] = (
    tracts["env_exposure_index"]
    .rank(pct=True)
)

tracts.plot(
    column="exposure_percentile",
    cmap="viridis",
    legend=True,
    figsize=(6,6)
)
```

# Spatial Join with Community Areas
```{python}
community = gpd.read_file(DATA_DIR / "Boundaries_-_Community_Areas_20260228.geojson")

community = community.to_crs(tracts.crs)

if "index_right" in tracts.columns:
    tracts = tracts.drop(columns="index_right")

tracts = gpd.sjoin(
    tracts,
    community[["community", "geometry"]],
    how="left",
    predicate="intersects"
)
```


# Save Final Results
```{python}
tracts.to_file(PROCESSED_DIR / "chicago_env_exposure_index.gpkg", layer="tracts", driver="GPKG")

tracts.drop(columns="geometry").to_csv(PROCESSED_DIR / "chicago_env_exposure_index.csv", index=False)
```
